text: Two large zebras standing in a dry field.
A road construction sign sitting under a tree next to a sidewalk.
A man riding down a snow covered slope through a forest.
A propeller of an airplane appears to be non moving against the sky.
An intersection with two street signs with a traffic light
A frosted birthday cake balances on the seat of a green bicycle.
A small doughnut in a silver metallic wrapper.
Several clocks stand on poles in a crowded outdoor area.
Cows, people, and vehicles on a city street.
Some cows grazing in a field with overcast skies.
